title: CocoGuard
subtitle: Coconut Disease & Pest Detection System
description: AI-powered precision-agriculture platform detecting nutritional deficiencies and pest infestations in coconut leaves from drone imagery. MERN dashboard with GPS-tagged plantation health maps, severity alerts, and auto-generated PDF diagnostic reports.

title: TogetherLearn
subtitle: Collaborative University Learning Platform
description: Microservice platform (10 services) with Spring Cloud Gateway, JWT auth, Redis rate limiting, Resilience4j circuit breakers, and RabbitMQ messaging. Real-time WebSocket group chat, Q&A forum, and observability via Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK Stack.

title: Stockly
subtitle: AI-Powered Smart Inventory Management
description: Full-stack supermarket inventory platform with XGBoost demand forecasting, weather-aware stocking, holiday-aware forecasting, ML bundle suggestions, and JWT-based RBAC. Plotly dashboards and PDF report generation.

title: Human Following Robot
subtitle: Vision-Based Robot with Safety Zone
description: Vision-based human-following robot using YOLOv8n person detection, CSRT tracking, and depth-based proportional motion control with four speed zones. Gesture-controlled start/stop via MediaPipe skeleton detection and RGB-D depth segmentation.

title: BusHub
subtitle: Real-Time Bus Tracking & Seat Booking
description: Cross-platform Flutter application with live GPS bus tracking, real-time Firestore seat availability updates, push notifications, and Stripe payment integration.

title: MartChat
subtitle: Supermarket NLP Chatbot
description: NLP chatbot for supermarket item location prediction and automated shopping list generation with PDF export support, built with Flask and NLTK.

title: JETSET GO
subtitle: Flight Allocation Web Application
description: Web application streamlining communication between pilots and engineers, improving flight allocation efficiency and cross-browser compatibility.
